title: Goribby's 3D
description: A 3D resource pack that aims to improve the vanilla blocks while being as optimized as possible.
body:
**Goribby's 3D** is a resource pack that aims to improve the vanilla game look by adding more complex and detailed models, while being as optimized as possible.
It also works with other resource packs, however keep in mind that I used the vanilla textures when modelling, so some texture packs may be misaligned.

On the download page, you can also find **Goribby's 3D - Extra**, which features some models that didn't make it into the standard pack for optimization purposes. You're not required to download it, the main pack works perfectly without it.

Optifine is not required to use this pack.
